message:
chore: Add e2e-artifacts/ to gitignore

Exclude E2E test harness runtime artifacts from version control.
These are generated during test runs and should not be committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -50,3 +50,6 @@ temp/
 # Generated documentation (build on demand)
 doc/
 .ntm/
+
+# E2E test artifacts (runtime)
+e2e-artifacts/
